properties.name: app.logging.access.kafka.producer.enabled
properties.description: Enable or disable the dedicated Kafka producer for access logs.

properties.name: app.logging.access.kafka.producer.acks
properties.description: Kafka producer acks configuration for access logs.

properties.name: app.logging.access.kafka.producer.idempotence
properties.description: Enable Kafka producer idempotence for access logs.

properties.name: app.logging.access.kafka.producer.retries
properties.description: Number of retries for the Kafka access logs producer.

properties.name: app.logging.access.kafka.producer.max-in-flight
properties.description: Max in-flight requests per connection for Kafka access logs producer.

properties.name: app.logging.access.kafka.producer.delivery-timeout-ms
properties.description: Delivery timeout in milliseconds for Kafka access logs producer.

properties.name: app.logging.access.kafka.producer.request-timeout-ms
properties.description: Request timeout in milliseconds for Kafka access logs producer.

properties.name: app.logging.access.kafka.producer.linger-ms
properties.description: Linger time in milliseconds for Kafka access logs producer batching.

properties.name: app.logging.access.kafka.producer.compression-type
properties.description: Compression type for Kafka access logs producer.
